description: PKB Starter -- Optional Skill Catalog. Skills listed here are NOT bundled with PKB Starter. They are installed on demand via install_skills.py.

skills.name: Obsidian Skills
skills.description: Claude Code skills for Obsidian vault management: create/rename/move notes, manage wikilinks, search vault.
skills.notes: Recommended for all profiles. Enhances Obsidian vault interaction.

skills.name: Academic Research Skills
skills.description: Research architect, synthesis, and report compilation agents for academic work.
skills.notes: Output routed to wiki/outputs/research/ and wiki/sources/.

skills.name: Deep Research Skills
skills.description: Multi-turn deep research with source tracking, evidence synthesis, and structured reports.
skills.notes: May consume significant tokens for deep multi-turn research.

skills.name: Agent Research Skills
skills.description: Agent-based research pipeline: literature search, paper analysis, citation extraction.
skills.notes: Research output mapped to wiki/papers/ and wiki/sources/.

skills.name: Zotero MCP Server
skills.description: MCP server connecting Claude Code to Zotero reference manager for citation and library access.
skills.notes: Requires MCP configuration in .claude/mcp.json. Needs Zotero running locally.

skills.name: Zotero MCP Skill
skills.description: Claude Code skill wrapping Zotero MCP for bibliography and reference management.
skills.notes: Depends on zotero-mcp MCP server. Both must be installed and configured.

skills.name: Anthropic Skills
skills.description: Official Anthropic skill collection for document processing, PDF handling, and more.
skills.notes: Official Anthropic skills. Document output routed to wiki/outputs/.

skills.name: QMD
skills.description: Semantic search and question-answering over local markdown knowledge bases.
skills.notes: Search results do not modify wiki directly. Route through /project:inbox.

skills.name: Kanban Skill
skills.description: Kanban board management within Claude Code for project task tracking.
skills.notes: Kanban board data stored in wiki/tasks/.

skills.name: Obsidian Claude PKM
skills.description: Reference implementation of Claude + Obsidian personal knowledge management workflow.
skills.notes: Reference implementation. Useful for workflow inspiration.

skills.name: Daily Patterns Pack
skills.description: Daily note templates and recurring patterns for personal knowledge management.
skills.notes: Template pack. Review before adopting patterns.

skills.name: Awesome Agent Skills
skills.description: Curated index of Claude Code agent skills across the ecosystem.
skills.notes: Index only. No executable skills. Browse for discovery.

skills.name: Awesome Claude Skills
skills.description: Composio-curated index of Claude Code skills and tools.

skills.name: Z-Skills
skills.description: Comprehensive skill collection (web-pack, excel-editor, md-excel, smart-xparse, mail-reader). Anthropic-owned.
skills.notes: REFERENCE ONLY. Code is (c) Anthropic, ALL RIGHTS RESERVED. Do NOT clone or copy. Read for design inspiration only. PKB web_pack is an independent clean-room implementation.
